title: Drain Fly Treatment in Irvington, Westchester | $350-$550

intro: Drain flies infesting your Irvington home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive drain fly treatment services throughout Irvington and Westchester County. Our licensed technicians eliminate drain fly infestations at the source with proven methods tailored to your property's unique needs.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Irvington residents for years with safe, effective drain fly solutions that target breeding sites in drains, pipes, and moisture-prone areas. Our experienced team understands the specific challenges of Westchester properties and delivers lasting results with a satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Irvington's beautiful historic homes along the Hudson River, charming village center, and older plumbing systems can create ideal conditions for drain fly infestations. From Victorian estates near the Irvington waterfront to apartments in the downtown area, we protect all property types throughout this scenic Westchester community.

faqs.question: How much does drain fly treatment cost in Irvington?
faqs.answer: Our drain fly treatment service in Irvington ranges from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of drains affected, and the size of your property. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate drain flies in my Irvington home?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments show significant results within 24-48 hours, with complete elimination typically achieved within 7-10 days. Our process includes treating breeding sites, eliminating larvae, and applying preventive measures to stop future infestations.

faqs.question: What causes drain fly infestations in Irvington homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies breed in the organic buildup inside drains, pipes, and areas with standing water. Irvington's older homes often have aging plumbing systems where organic matter accumulates, creating perfect breeding grounds. High humidity and infrequently used drains also contribute to infestations.

faqs.question: Are your drain fly treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. Our treatments focus on mechanical removal and bio-enzymatic solutions that break down organic matter without harsh chemicals, making them ideal for Irvington households.
